languages.text: [Включить вокс] "Наконец-то можно вернуться к рекафу, купальне и горячей пище! Вигдис, где мой шаттл?!"
[Activate vox] "Finally, time to get back to recaf, baths, and a hot meal! Vigdis, where is my shuttle?"
languages.original_text: [Включить вокс] "Наконец-то можно вернуться к рекафу, купальне и горячей пище! Вигдис, где мой шаттл?!"

traits.locale_text: [Activate vox] "Finally, back to recaf, the baths, and a hot meal! Vigdis, where is my shuttle?"
[Activate vox] "Finally, back to recaf, the baths, and a hot meal! Vigdis, where is my shuttle?"
[Activate vox] "Finally, time to get back to recaf, baths, and a hot meal! Vigdis, where is my shuttle?"
[Activate vox] "Finally, time to get back to recaf, baths, and a hot meal! Vigdis, where is my shuttle?"

languages.text: 【启动音阵】“总算能回去喝口雷卡咖啡、泡个澡，再吃顿热乎饭了！维格迪斯，我的穿梭机在哪儿？”
languages.original_text: [Activate vox] "Finally, time to get back to recaf, baths, and a hot meal! Vigdis, where is my shuttle?"

traits.locale_text: 【启动音阵】“总算能回去喝口雷卡咖啡、泡个澡，再吃顿热乎饭了！维格迪斯，我的穿梭机在哪儿？”

languages.text: [Voksu etkinleştir] "Sonunda kahfeye, banyolara ve sıcak yemeklere döneceğiz! Vigdis, mekiğim nerede?"
languages.original_text: [Activate vox] "Finally, time to get back to recaf, baths, and a hot meal! Vigdis, where is my shuttle?"

traits.locale_text: [Voksu etkinleştir] "Sonunda kahfeye, banyolara ve sıcak yemeklere döneceğiz! Vigdis, mekiğim nerede?"

languages.text: [Allumer votre vox] « Bien, nous allons enfin pouvoir retrouver le recaff, les bains et les repas chauds ! Vigdis, où est ma navette ? »
languages.original_text: [Activate vox] "Finally, time to get back to recaf, baths, and a hot meal! Vigdis, where is my shuttle?"

traits.locale_text: [Allumer votre vox] « Bien, nous allons enfin pouvoir retrouver le recaff, les bains et les repas chauds ! Vigdis, où est ma navette ? »

languages.text: [Activar voco] «Por fin, ¡hora de volver a tener café, baño y comida caliente! Vigdis, ¿dónde está mi lanzadera?».
languages.original_text: [Activate vox] "Finally, time to get back to recaf, baths, and a hot meal! Vigdis, where is my shuttle?"

traits.locale_text: [Activar voco] «Por fin, ¡hora de volver a tener café, baño y comida caliente! Vigdis, ¿dónde está mi lanzadera?».

languages.text: [Vox aktivieren] "Es wird Zeit für einen Recaf, ein Bad und eine warme Mahlzeit! Vigdis, wo ist mein Shuttle?"
languages.original_text: [Activate vox] "Finally, time to get back to recaf, baths, and a hot meal! Vigdis, where is my shuttle?"

traits.locale_text: [Vox aktivieren] "Es wird Zeit für einen Recaf, ein Bad und eine warme Mahlzeit! Vigdis, wo ist mein Shuttle?"

languages.text: [ボイスを活性化]「ついに、カフェに戻って、お風呂に入って、温かい食事をする時が来たわ！ヴィグディス、私のシャトルはどこ？」
languages.original_text: [Activate vox] "Finally, time to get back to recaf, baths, and a hot meal! Vigdis, where is my shuttle?"

traits.locale_text: [ボイスを活性化]「ついに、カフェに戻って、お風呂に入って、温かい食事をする時が来たわ！ヴィグディス、私のシャトルはどこ？」
